examples.title: Exclusive Flower Bouquets
examples.description: Discover our exclusive bouquets, crafted with the freshest blooms for every occasion.

about-us.title: Who are we?
about-us.description: High-end floral artistry, with an impeccable experience.
about-us.lead: I'm Débora, and I believe in the power of details.
about-us.p1: Here, we transform the everyday into the extraordinary through high-end floral artistry. My mission is to give you an experience of absolute elegance, where simplicity and exclusivity meet in every bouquet. I want every interaction with our brand to feel unforgettable—designed for those who, like you, value sophistication without complications.
about-us.p2: But we don’t stop there. My dream is to position Las Flores de la Imprenta as the ultimate reference for floral luxury in Argentina. We’re redefining the rules by blending traditional craft with technological innovation.
about-us.p3: We want to be close to you on every channel, building a vibrant community and an experience that doesn’t just meet expectations—it anticipates your desires and surpasses what you thought was possible from a flower shop.

questions.title: Frequently Asked Questions
questions.description: Find the answers to your questions

items.question: Where are you located and do you deliver?
items.answer: Our shop is at Soler 212, Bahía Blanca. Yes, we deliver to your home! The shipping cost is calculated based on your location.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept bank transfers, cash, and credit or debit cards (single payment). You can pay in Argentine pesos or in US dollars.

items.question: How can I reserve a product?
items.answer: Very easy—just tap the green WhatsApp button that says “Reserve” and our team will help you right away.

items.question: How do I join a membership?
items.answer: You have two options: subscribe directly on our website, or message us on WhatsApp and our team will guide you through the process personally.

items.question: What events and spaces do you cover with your decoration service?
items.answer: We mainly work on weddings, corporate events, and medium to large private events. Every space deserves something special!

items.question: How can I request a quote?
items.answer: You can do it in two ways: tap the “Request a quote” button to connect with our team on WhatsApp, or call us to talk personally.
